nasb.text: Thus the Lord said to me, “Go and buy yourself a linen waistband and put it around your waist, but do not put it in water.”

esv.text: Thus says the Lord to me, “Go and buy a linen loincloth and put it around your waist, and do not dip it in water.”

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣對我說：“你去為自己買一根麻布腰帶，束在腰上，但不要把它放在水中。”

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说：“你去买一条麻布腰带束在腰间，不可让它沾水。”
